female

epidural infusion of 0.25% bupivacaine with hydromorphone 10 mcg per mL and clonidine 1 mcg per mL

epidural site was nontender to palpation

blood and urine cultures were sent
chest x-ray was negative for an active pulmonary process
laboratory workup was notable for an increase in white count

patient responded to favorably with abatement of fever

imaging demonstrated an epidural collection from the inferior margin of C3 to T1
compression of the left C5 and C6 nerve roots

no cord deformity
